tips_en: If you're interested in AI agent systems, start with the KnowAct-GUIClaw paper (Paper 3) — it offers concrete SOTA results and a practical closed-loop architecture for cross-platform GUI agents. Then read Paper 1, which tackles the complementary engineering problem of maintaining and modifying the large agent harnesses (like those used in Paper 3) through behavior-centric representations, a useful foundation for anyone building or evolving such systems. Paper 2 (OvisOCR2) is more self-contained and can be read independently for document-AI work.
tips_zh: 如果你关注AI智能体系统，建议先读第三篇（KnowAct-GUIClaw）——它给出了具体的SOTA结果和跨平台GUI智能体的闭环架构，实操性强。接着读第一篇，它解决的是智能体底层基础设施（agent harness）的工程维护问题，与第三篇互补，对构建或演进大型智能体系统的读者很有参考价值。第二篇（OvisOCR2）相对独立，专注文档解析方向，可按需阅读。
